reference: I have pain in the back of my thigh since three months. I feel great pain when standing up after sitting down. As per the MRI report, there is encroachment of a nerve into the space of another nerve. They advised me to undergo surgery. Now, advise me: is there any other option? If I decide to have the surgery performed by you, what are the risks for me?
text: I have pain in the back of my thigh since three months. I feel great pain when standing up after sitting down. As per the MRI report, there is encroachment of a nerve into the space of another nerve. They advised me to undergo surgery. Now, advise me to undergo surgery. Advise me, is there any other option? If I decide to have the surgery performed by you, what are the risks for me?
